title: Privacy Policy
lead: This Privacy Policy explains how Anubis Underground ("we", "our", "us") collects, uses, and protects personal information when you visit our website or contact us through our online contact form.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
paragraphs: We only collect personal information that you voluntarily provide through the contact form, including:
In addition, technical information such as your IP address may be processed automatically for security, anti-abuse, and server-log purposes.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
paragraphs: We use the information you provide only to:
We do not sell, rent, or disclose your personal data to third parties, except where required by applicable law.
bullets: Communicate with you regarding your message
Maintain the security and proper functioning of our website

sections.heading: 3. Data Storage and Security
paragraphs: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect data against unauthorized access, misuse, alteration, or loss. Messages submitted through our website may be stored in our email system or site backend for as long as reasonably necessary to process and resolve your inquiry.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Our website may rely on external hosting and content-delivery services (such as CDN or image hosting). These providers may process technical data, including IP addresses, for security and performance.
We do not use analytics tools, advertising trackers, or marketing cookies.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at {email}.
bullets: Request access to your personal data
Request correction or deletion of your data
Restrict or object to certain processing

sections.heading: 6. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The most recent version will always be published on this page.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at {email}.
